rules.description: Authorization followed by attestation applies a normative condition and then records a verified claim about it.
rules.note: AZ and AT are also classified as orthogonal in Reference.Orthogonality. Composable and orthogonal are not contradictory: AZ affects normative status; AT records a claim.

rules.description: Bind followed by unbind establishes and then removes a bearer, context, or applicability association.
rules.note: Composition relation only; does not assert persistence restoration.

rules.description: Split followed by merge divides and then recombines a structure.
rules.note: Composition relation only; does not assert identity restoration.
